name: Stupidella Click
author: Poki
description: Guess who's is back? Stupidella Click is a whacky point-and-click game about the wild adventures of Stupidella! Click your way through rapidly changing levels, following Stupidella along various insane scenarios. This game only uses a mouse clicking mechanic, but it really test your speed and logic and becomes more difficult with each passing challenge. If you're feeling stuck somewhere, you can always get a helpful hint to get you on the right track. Can you find your way through all of Stupidella's tests? How do I play Stupidella Click? Click around the different levels to find the solution! Who created Stupidella Click? Stupidella Click is created by Stupidella. Play their other games on Poki: Stupidella 1 , Stupidella 2 , Stupidella 3 , Stupidella 4 , Troll Toilet Quest 1 and Troll Toilet Quest 2 ! How can I play Stupidella Click for free? You can play Stupidella Click for free on Poki. Can I play Stupidella Click on mobile devices and desktop? Stupidella Click can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
